item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly brakes the requested N+1 split, identifies the repeated downstream patch pattern across the prior cases, refuses treating another gift counter as the normal/default solution, and moves upstream to entrance messaging, eligibility precheck, and inventory/coupon status confirmation. It allows only a bounded same-day emergency channel with closure and data capture, so it does not fall into the fail signal of simply opening another permanent handling port."}
